blockingIssues.description: bayesian_confidence_decay functions are implemented but not wired into memory retrieval pipeline. The feature description says 'Wire decay.rs to implement' but no callers exist outside tests.
Feature requirement 'Accessing a memory entry resets its decay timer' is not implemented. decay.rs only calculates decay, does not interact with memory store to reset last_reinforcement on access.
Feature requirement 'optionally boosts confidence based on validation' is not implemented. No validation-based confidence boost mechanism exists.
ConflictResolutionService is exported from lib.rs but NOT integrated into SqliteMemoryStore. The store() and update() methods do not call detect_and_resolve() to check for conflicting memories.
Feature 'mem-conflict-resolution-wiring' does not exist in features.json. The conflict_resolution.rs module exists (19 passing tests) but no work was tracked for the wiring integration.

validate_procedure_for_auto_application method is implemented (47 tests) but never called from any external component. The feature requires wiring to validate learned procedures before auto-application but no integration exists.
Database schema does not include org, workspace, framework, environment, or session_id columns. Only repository, language, task_type are persisted. The full 8-level hierarchy is NOT implemented.
row_to_entry() hardcodes org, workspace, framework, environment, session_id to empty/None instead of reading from database.
cross_scope_override flag in MemoryQuery is defined but never checked or enforced in search(). The feature requirement 'Cross-scope queries require explicit cross_scope_override' is not implemented.
No validation rejects queries without any scope specification. Feature says 'Queries without any scope specification are rejected with an error' but this check does not exist.
INSERT statement only persists repository, language, task_type. Other hierarchy fields from MemoryEntry are discarded.
Feature 'mem-lancedb-integration' is NOT registered in features.json. The LanceDB implementation exists but was never tracked as a feature in the mission workflow.
No handoff or worker transcript exists for this feature. Unable to verify skill usage or procedure adherence.
recall@10 >= 0.9 target from feature description is not verified by tests. test_recall_with_structured_vectors only asserts recall >= 0.5.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that when a feature description says 'wire X to Y', it means X must be integrated into Y's execution path, not just implemented as a standalone module.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-confidence-decay, mem-conflict-resolution-wiring, and mem-golden-sample-validation all implemented their modules correctly but failed to wire them into the memory system

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that MemoryEntry scope hierarchy fields (org, workspace, framework, environment, session_id) must be persisted to the database when implementing memory scoping features. The mismatch between MemoryEntry interface definition and SqliteMemoryStore implementation should be documented.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-hierarchical-scoping only persisted 3 of 8 hierarchy fields, causing data loss

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce that all features must be registered in features.json before work begins. Features implemented outside the mission workflow cannot be properly validated.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-lancedb-integration was implemented but not registered in features.json

rejectedObservations.observation: event_log types not explicitly re-exported in lib.rs
rejectedObservations.reason: Not a blocking issue - module is public, following Rust conventions

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission directory path does not exist
rejectedObservations.reason: This is environmental - the mission was set up correctly, reviewers found existing implementations through git history

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature ID mismatch between task prompts and features.json
rejectedObservations.reason: Not actionable - this is a mission setup issue, not a code issue
